rulings.Case Title: JOY ANDERSON VS. CITIAPARTMENTS, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Non-Statutory Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: HOUSING COURT LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR FRIDAY, MARCH 07, 2014. LINE 1. DEFENDANTs 500 LARKIN B8A MEZZ, LLC, 500 LARKIN B8A, LLC, LEM-RAY PROPERTIES I DE, LLC, SKYLINE REALTY INC., LEMBI, FRANK AS TRUSTEE OF THE FRANK E. LEMBI, RAYNAL, DAVID, RAYNAL, and DAVID AS TRUSTEE OF THE DAVID M. RAYNAL's Motion For Non-Statutory Judgment On The Pleadings. Granted in part and denied in part. Motion is denied as to the first cause of action. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges a cause of action under 1950.5. Motion is granted with leave to amend as to the second cause of action to allege damages (actual loss of money or property = (501/LKS) LATE TENTATIVE

rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH MARIE BARNSON KARNAZES VS. ISERVE et al
rulings.Rulings: HOUSING COURT LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR FRIDAY, MARCH 07, 2014. LINE 6. DEFENDANT CITIMORTGAGE, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with 90-day leave to amend to allege facts to support each element of her causes of action for intentional tort, negligence, breach of contract and fraud. Defendant's demurer was properly calendared in Department 501 (Real Property/Housing Court) as Plaintiff's Second Amended Complaint filed on December 30, 2013 indicates that it is a complaint for "other (specify) fraud, unlawful foreclosure, etc." = (501/LKS) LATE TENTATIVE.
